title: stelis lancifera
intro: Stelis lancifera, also known as the "tongue orchid," is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid compounds. The health benefits of Stelis lancifera include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and wound healer. Herbal preparations of Stelis lancifera can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and utilization in various forms.
